title: Magisitas Rarity Icons
description:
Custom Rarities for each item ! Fully editable !
Eclectic Trove and Icons compatibility !!!
body: - [](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/magisitas-rarity-icons) [](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/magisitas-rarity-icons) [](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft%2Ftexture-packs/magisitas-rarity-icons) [](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/magisitas-rarity-icons) - - ## 1.21.1 REQUIRES ICONS TO WORK - [](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/icons/version/1.11.3) [](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/icons/files/5743895) [](https://www.legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/icons/files/5743895) ## If you need help, **readme.txt** is **in the zip** for this. **@magisitas** on **Discord** if that didn't help ## Latest Update 1.0.4 by PlanetWaffle : Added Golden Dandelion Rarity change on Name Tag ## Latest Update 1.0.3 by PlanetWaffle : ![Command Rarity](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e55a1f180739abdbdd7d0113bfa99a646783b36e.png) Added Command Rarity to items that are obtained with commands Added to see how much food you can get with the food item you have Added all of 1.21.11 items to the list of rarity ## Latest Update 1.0.2 : Loot Beam Up Support ! - [](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/loot-beams-up/version/3.6.1-mc1.21-.1) [](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/loot-beams-up/files/6313537) [](https://www.legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/loot-beams-up/files/6313537)[](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/loot-beams-up/version/3.6.1-mc1.21-.1) [](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/loot-beams-up/files/6313537) [](https://www.legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/loot-beams-up/files/6313537) # Magisitas Rarity Icons **_Featuring :_** ## 7 Unique Rarities : ### Creative Rarity : - Only for **Creative** items ! - This includes all the items you cannot get in you inventory normaly in survival. - ![Creative Rarity](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/r5UzCz0M/images/01033854c85da683e48e6682ec3609d9cf4944e4.gif) ### Unique Rarity : - Only for **Unique** items ! - This includes only the Dragon Egg since it's the only item you cannot get multiple of ~~(without cheats)~~ - ![Unique Rarity](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/r5UzCz0M/images/b62d288bd935d5b959f00765c6c40e6a2421270a.gif) ### Artifact Rarity : - This includes items that are very hard to get, usually the best reward of the most diffcult Regions of the game. - Nether Star, Disc 5, Mace and even Elytras are here ! - ![Artifact Rarity](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/r5UzCz0M/images/7458f4423e58ccc1de966ddaff35d70aa96d9c47.gif) ### Trophee, Epic, Rare, Common and Trash Rarities : - These items were given a rarity based on my personal feeling, feel free to give me feedback if you want some changes ! - Btw yes most items are in the common rarity, junk is only here for like dirt cobble etc ![Trophee Rarity](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/r5UzCz0M/images/d61ac3aaf05b75fae0d58047d0a29205dacb1c98.gif)![Epic Rarity](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/r5UzCz0M/images/dfba2ec8b89fcb46aaf10cf2f6be998cbde5baeb.gif)![Rare Rarity](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/r5UzCz0M/images/ec307ff37b89ee8b21f071d07828d9bc17edcaec.gif)![Common Rarity](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/r5UzCz0M/images/da0b3348e326a456b711f28c4d9c7e903ea74539.gif)![Junk Rarity](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/r5UzCz0M/images/a18ee6c004ada985a48f9e66ed97670e4b9251ee_350.webp) ## Eclectic Trove + Legendary Tooltips Support Yes, you need the Legendary Tooltips mod to use all the features. It is needed for the Cool tooltip art and animations to work. Without this mod, you will only get Rarity Icons and Color text ! - [](https://modrinth.com/mod/legendary-tooltips/version/1.4.11) [](https://modrinth.com/mod/legendary-tooltips/version/mETd5tfg) [](https://modrinth.com/mod/legendary-tooltips/version/JLVpPTBZ) [](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/legendary-tooltips/files/5591020) [](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/legendary-tooltips/files/5591027) [](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/legendary-tooltips/files/5591022) [](https://www.legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/legendary-tooltips/files/5591020) [](https://www.legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/legendary-tooltips/files/5591027) [](https://www.legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/legendary-tooltips/files/5591022) - [](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/eclectic-trove-legendary-tooltips/version/1.2.0) [](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/eclectic-trove-legendary-tooltips/files/4827554) [](https://www.legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/eclectic-trove-legendary-tooltips/files/4827554) **YOU NEED TO USE MY CUSTOM CONFIG FILE (in the zip) FOR THIS TO WORK (more info in the readme.txt)** ### Enchant, Potions and Trims priority System Enchants, Potions and Trims take the tooltip of the highest rarity they have. If you have mutiple enchants on a book for exemple, the tooltip will be the one of the best enchant ! This also works when equiped on armor as shown here : ![Enchants Rarity Increase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/r5UzCz0M/images/d6ad0acb5dec26dd7025d240770269fac6d68c6c.gif)![Potions Rarity Increase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/r5UzCz0M/images/b7e33e231e0fa8231c5cbcb65ffda1c92ac51370.gif)![Trims Rarity Increase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/r5UzCz0M/images/3ec60f6bb58cad51b85e03140845291751a46bf4.gif)![Armor Comparaison](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/r5UzCz0M/images/9fa303dc169f488fab100ed38e19f2ce4db5e413.gif) ## Item Borders Support You will also need Items border to get the cool borders like here ! This will not work without Eclectic Trove + Legendary Tooltips - [](https://modrinth.com/mod/item-borders/version/1.2.5) [](https://modrinth.com/mod/item-borders/version/C4c6jXLI) [](https://modrinth.com/mod/item-borders/version/WjErgKWV) [](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/item-borders-fabric/files/5591003) [](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/item-borders/files/5591005) [](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/item-borders/files/5591010) [](https://www.legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/item-borders-fabric/files/5591003) [](https://www.legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/item-borders/files/5591005) [](https://www.legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/item-borders/files/5591010) **YOU NEED TO USE MY CUSTOM CONFIG FILE (in the zip) FOR THIS TO WORK (more info in the readme.txt)** ![Shiny Icons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/r5UzCz0M/images/d7ea3e3dfaf8f2b78b3480db20abb37e61b6d3af.gif) ## Fully Customisable ! You can customize the pack and the config files yourself ! I highly suggest doing it if you like coding things, its not hard I made it very explicit in the readme.txt, also you can change the rarity icons if you want # Have fun playing !
